title: Backend Engineer (Python)
description: We are looking for a Backend Engineer to design and maintain scalable REST APIs using Python and Django. You will work with PostgreSQL databases, containerize services with Docker, and deploy on AWS. Experience with microservices architecture is a plus.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Join our ML team to build and deploy NLP models for text classification and information extraction. You'll work with PyTorch and Scikit-learn, process large datasets with Pandas, and collaborate with data engineers on production pipelines.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build end-to-end web applications using React on the frontend and Node.js/Express on the backend. Experience with MongoDB and TypeScript preferred. You will own features from design to deployment.

title: Data Scientist
description: We need a Data Scientist to drive experimentation and predictive modeling for our product team. Strong statistics background, experience running A/B tests, and the ability to communicate insights via Tableau dashboards are essential.

title: AI/LLM Application Engineer
description: Design and build LLM-powered applications including RAG pipelines, agentic workflows, and prompt-engineered features. Experience with vector databases (Chroma, Pinecone, Weaviate) and frameworks like LangChain or LlamaIndex is highly desirable.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Own our CI/CD pipelines and Kubernetes infrastructure. You'll automate deployments, manage AWS infrastructure with Terraform, and improve system reliability and observability.

title: Junior Python Developer
description: Entry-level role for a Python developer to build and maintain Flask-based internal tools. Great opportunity for freshers to learn production coding practices, SQL, and version control with Git.

title: NLP Research Engineer
description: Research and implement state-of-the-art NLP models using Transformers and Hugging Face libraries. Contribute to publications and internal tooling for embedding-based search and retrieval systems.

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: Design cloud-native architectures for enterprise clients across AWS and Azure. Lead technical discussions on system design, security, and scalability with senior stakeholders.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze sales and inventory data to support business decisions. Build dashboards in Power BI, write SQL queries against our data warehouse, and present findings to category managers.

title: Generative AI Engineer
description: Build production Generative AI features including retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, agentic assistants, and embedding-based semantic search. You'll work closely with product to ship LLM features fast using FastAPI backends.

title: Software Engineer - Backend
description: Develop high-throughput microservices for our payments platform using Java and Spring Boot. Experience with Kafka-based event streaming and financial systems is a strong plus.

title: Product Analyst - AI Products
description: Partner with product managers to analyze usage of our AI-powered features. Write SQL and Python analyses, design A/B tests, and translate data into product recommendations.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Develop computer vision models for object detection and tracking in robotics applications. Work with OpenCV and PyTorch to deploy models on edge devices.

title: Frontend Developer (React)
description: Build responsive, accessible UI components in React and TypeScript. Collaborate with designers to implement pixel-perfect interfaces and improve frontend performance.
